page: Microsoft Azure D64nlds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the Dnldv6 server family. It is configured with 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features a low-memory configuration relative to its compute capacity, providing 128.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server is equipped with 3780 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It is designed as a network-optimized instance, prioritizing high-throughput network performance. The instance does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Due to its low memory-to-CPU ratio of 1:2, the D64nlds_v6 offers a cost-efficient profile for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive RAM footprints. This resource density makes it suitable for network-optimized tasks, high-compute processing, local storage-bound applications, and database workloads that benefit from dedicated vCPUs and local disk capacity without the added cost of excess memory.
description: The Microsoft Azure D64nlds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Dnldv6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:2 memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per vCPU. This network-optimized instance is equipped with 3780 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks integrated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for compute-heavy and network-intensive operations, its hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency by minimizing memory overhead while delivering substantial processing power and local disk capacity. The D64nlds_v6 is suited for workloads such as network-optimized applications, distributed compute tasks, and storage-dependent databases that require dedicated CPU resources without high memory demands.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D64nlds_v6 is a network-optimized, low-memory virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3780 GB of local storage on the Hyper-V hypervisor.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D64nlds_v6 is a network-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage.
tagline: A network-optimized compute instance featuring sixty-four dedicated cores, low memory density, and substantial local storage capacity.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
128.0 GB system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
No integrated GPU resources or complimentary public IPv4 addresses
Optimized for compute-heavy and storage-dependent applications
